## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat (new feature, minor bump)
- [ ] fix (bug fix, patch bump)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] refactor / perf / style
- [ ] chore / build / ci / test
- [ ] breaking change (major bump - include `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer in commit)

## Package(s) touched

- [ ] `svelte-p5` (core)
- [ ] `svelte-p5-components` (components)
- [ ] docs / examples
- [ ] repo tooling

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Manually verified in `docs/examples/`
- [ ] Updated relevant docs

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, alternatives considered, follow-ups. -->
